text:
Once upon a time, in the heart of a lush, enchanted forest, there was a small, yet magnificent oak tree named Eldric. Eldric was special not just because of its towering height and sprawling branches, but because it was the guardian of the forest's secrets and the home of Qwen.

Qwen was a young, playful spirit who loved to frolic through the leaves and listen to the songs of the birds. She would often climb up to the highest branch of Eldric, where she felt the most alive. One day, as she perched on a leafy branch, she noticed a tiny acorn nestled among the green canopy.

"Hello, little one," whispered Qwen, her voice barely a whisper but filled with warmth. "What brings you here?"

The acorn trembled slightly before speaking, "I... I'm afraid. My brothers and sisters have fallen, and I don't know how to survive alone."

Qwen smiled and said, "Don't worry
